MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF GARY JOHNSON's Motion To Lift Stay Of Litigation.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Plaintiff Gary Johnson's motion to lift stay of litigation is granted per defendants' statement of non-opposition.

As to the other issues raised in defendants' statement, if the parties are unable to stipulate to a new hearing date for the motion to disqualify, defendants may renotice that motion. If defendants wish to have a special master appointed, they may file an appropriate motion. Defendants shall meet and confer with plaintiff before demurring to the First Amended Complaint, as required by Code of Civil Procedure section 430.41. The deadline for defendants to file a responsive pleading to the First Amended Complaint shall be 30 days after notice of entry of the Court's order lifting the stay.

Order signed.
